comment: Nx-style manifest. Each entry pairs a codemod with the acture version at which it was first published. Mirrors the in-code MANIFEST in src/manifest.ts.

codemods.name: wrap-handler-with-mutation
codemods.description: Wrap onClick/onChange/onSubmit handler expressions with wrapMutation().

codemods.name: extract-onclick-to-command
codemods.description: Lift inline arrow handlers into module-level defineCommand calls.

codemods.name: redux-action-to-command
codemods.description: Convert dispatch({type, payload}) call sites to registry.dispatch(id, payload).

codemods.name: usestate-mutation-to-command
codemods.description: Wrap inline handlers whose body is composed of useState setter calls with wrapMutation.

codemods.name: rtk-thunk-to-command
codemods.description: Convert createAsyncThunk(id, payloadCreator) into defineCommand({id, title, execute}).
